message:
🐛 Auto-inject "Fixes #N" closing keyword in Copilot PR bodies (#332)

Copilot ignores the instruction to include "Fixes #ISSUE_NUMBER" in PR
descriptions despite the instruction being in copilot-instructions.md,
ai-fix.yml, and triage-command.yml. This means issues don't auto-close
when Copilot PRs are merged.

Adds step 4 to copilot-automation.yml that auto-detects the linked issue
and appends "Fixes #N" to the PR body using three fallback methods:
1. GraphQL closingIssuesReferences (GitHub's linked issues)
2. Search for open issues assigned to copilot-swe-agent[bot] with
   ai-awaiting-fix label
3. Extract #N references from PR body and verify they're open issues

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
